name: marcella frittata
instructions: saute onion, zucchini, and red bell pepper in butter + olive oil until tender. cool. beat eggs with grated parmesan, parsley, salt, pepper. combine with veg. cook in skillet on very low heat until set; flip or finish under broiler.
notes: marcella hazan. low heat is the whole point — high heat makes it rubbery. filling can't be watery — saute all the vegetables first to drive off moisture. also works as a scramble.
